records.question: What orders were placed by customers whose customer details is commodi?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT orders.order_id FROM orders
JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id
JOIN order_items ON orders.order_id = order_items.order_id
WHERE customers.customer_details = 'commodi'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.order_id FROM Orders AS T1 INNER JOIN Customers AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id WHERE T2.customer_details = 'commodi'

records.question: What orders have a status of Shipped and were placed exactly on 2009-02-21 15:26:19?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT orders.order_id FROM orders
JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id
WHERE orders.date_order_placed = '2009-02-21 15:26:19' AND orders.order_status = 'Shipped'
records.pred_sql: SELECT order_id FROM Orders WHERE order_status = 'Shipped' AND date_order_placed = '2009-02-21 15:26:19'

records.question: Which orders are currently On Road, were shipped on or after 1983-03-08 16:14:58, and have at least one Payed item?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT orders.order_id FROM orders
JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id
JOIN order_items ON orders.order_id = order_items.order_id
JOIN shipments ON orders.order_id = shipments.order_id
WHERE orders.order_status = 'On Road' AND shipments.shipment_date >= '1983-03-08 16:14:58' AND order_items.order_item_status = 'Payed'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.order_id FROM Orders AS T1 INNER JOIN Shipments AS T2 ON T1.order_id = T2.order_id INNER JOIN Order_Items AS T3 ON T1.order_id = T3.order_id WHERE T1.order_status = 'On Road' AND T2.shipment_date >= '1983-03-08 16:14:58' AND T3.order_item_status = 'Payed'

records.question: Which orders from customers named Hadley with details corrupti are currently packing, were placed on or before 2010-06-08 02:20:49, have shipment dates on or after 1982-01-24 12:13:16, and include order items with status Payed?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT orders.order_id FROM orders
JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id
JOIN order_items ON orders.order_id = order_items.order_id
JOIN shipments ON orders.order_id = shipments.order_id
WHERE customers.customer_name = 'Hadley' AND customers.customer_details = 'corrupti' AND order_items.order_item_status = 'Payed' AND orders.date_order_placed <= '2010-06-08 02:20:49' AND shipments.shipment_date >= '1982-01-24 12:13:16' AND orders.order_status = 'Packing'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.order_id FROM Orders AS T1 INNER JOIN Customers AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id INNER JOIN Shipments AS T3 ON T1.order_id = T3.order_id INNER JOIN Order_Items AS T4 ON T1.order_id = T4.order_id WHERE T2.customer_name = 'Hadley' AND T2.customer_details LIKE '%corrupti%' AND T1.order_status = 'packing' AND T1.date_order_placed <= '2010-06-08 02:20:49' AND T3.shipment_date >= '1982-01-24 12:13:16' AND T4.order_item_status = 'Payed'

records.question: Which Shipped orders were placed by customer Hershel with details vel on or after 1974-06-24 22:10:26, and shipped on or after 1985-11-12 12:41:34 with tracking number 2421?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT orders.order_id FROM orders
JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id
JOIN shipments ON orders.order_id = shipments.order_id
WHERE customers.customer_name = 'Hershel' AND shipments.shipment_date >= '1985-11-12 12:41:34' AND orders.date_order_placed >= '1974-06-24 22:10:26' AND shipments.shipment_tracking_number = '2421' AND customers.customer_details = 'vel' AND orders.order_status = 'Shipped'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.order_id FROM Orders AS T1 INNER JOIN Customers AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id INNER JOIN Shipments AS T3 ON T1.order_id = T3.order_id WHERE T2.customer_name = 'Hershel' AND T2.customer_details LIKE '%vel%' AND T1.date_order_placed >= '1974-06-24 22:10:26' AND T3.shipment_date >= '1985-11-12 12:41:34' AND T3.shipment_tracking_number = '2421'

records.question: Which orders that have customers, order items, and shipments have a status of exactly 'Packing'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT orders.order_id FROM orders
JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id
JOIN order_items ON orders.order_id = order_items.order_id
JOIN shipments ON orders.order_id = shipments.order_id
WHERE orders.order_status = 'Packing'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.order_id FROM Orders AS T1 INNER JOIN Customers AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id INNER JOIN Order_Items AS T3 ON T1.order_id = T3.order_id INNER JOIN Shipments AS T4 ON T1.order_id = T4.order_id WHERE T1.order_status = 'Packing'

records.question: Which orders have a status of On Road and were placed exactly on 1983-09-08 12:32:49?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT orders.order_id FROM orders
WHERE orders.date_order_placed = '1983-09-08 12:32:49' AND orders.order_status = 'On Road'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.order_id FROM Orders AS T1 WHERE T1.order_status = 'On Road' AND T1.date_order_placed = '1983-09-08 12:32:49'

records.question: Which orders have a status of On Road, contain items that are Payed, and have shipments with tracking number 0182 that were sent on or after 1973-06-20 14:26:43?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT orders.order_id FROM orders
JOIN order_items ON orders.order_id = order_items.order_id
JOIN shipments ON orders.order_id = shipments.order_id
WHERE orders.order_status = 'On Road' AND shipments.shipment_date >= '1973-06-20 14:26:43' AND order_items.order_item_status = 'Payed' AND shipments.shipment_tracking_number = '0182'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.order_id FROM Orders AS T1 INNER JOIN Order_Items AS T2 ON T1.order_id = T2.order_id INNER JOIN Shipments AS T3 ON T1.order_id = T3.order_id WHERE T1.order_status = 'On Road' AND T2.order_item_status = 'Payed' AND T3.shipment_tracking_number = '0182' AND T3.shipment_date >= '1973-06-20 14:26:43'
